Class AnimatedSprite

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.image.ImageView
sprites.AnimatedSprite
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class AnimatedSprite extends javafx.scene.image.ImageView
Represents an animated sprite.

  • Field Details

    • viewportWidth

      private double viewportWidth
      The width of the viewport for each frame.

    • viewportHeight

      private double viewportHeight
      The height of the viewport for each frame.

    • frameCount

      private int frameCount
      The total number of frames in the animation.

    • duration

      private double duration
      The duration of the entire animation in seconds.

    • delay

      private double delay
      The delay before the animation starts.

    • timeline

      private javafx.animation.Timeline timeline
      The timeline controlling the animation.

    • frameTime

      private double frameTime
      The duration of a single frame.

    • frameNumber

      private int frameNumber
      The current frame number being displayed.

    • viewportRects

      private ArrayList<javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D> viewportRects
      The list of rectangular viewports representing each frame.

    • indefiniteTimeline

      private javafx.animation.Timeline indefiniteTimeline
      An indefinite timeline for continuous looping animations.

    • playing

      private boolean playing
      A flag indicating if the animation is currently playing.

  • Constructor Details

    • AnimatedSprite

      public AnimatedSprite(String spritesheetURL, javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D viewport, int frameCount, double duration, double delay)
      Constructs a new AnimatedSprite.
      Parameters:
      spritesheetURL - the URL of the spritesheet image
      viewport - the initial viewport rectangle
      frameCount - the total number of frames in the animation
      duration - the total duration of one animation cycle
      delay - the delay before starting the animation

  • Method Details

    • initField

      private void initField(int frameCount, double duration, double delay)
      Initializes the fields for the animation.
      Parameters:
      frameCount - total frames
      duration - total duration
      delay - delay before start

    • createAnimationTimeline

      private javafx.animation.Timeline createAnimationTimeline()
      Creates the primary animation timeline.
      Returns:
      the configured Timeline

    • nextFrameNumber

      private void nextFrameNumber()
      Advances the animation to the next frame number.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(int repeat)
      Plays the animation for a specific number of repetitions.
      Parameters:
      repeat - the number of times to repeat the animation

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation()
      Plays the animation indefinitely.

    • stopAnimation

      public void stopAnimation()
      Stops the currently playing animation.

    • isPlaying

      public boolean isPlaying()
      Checks if the animation is currently playing.
      Returns:
      true if playing, false otherwise
